name: SFTP Server
description: SFTP server using atmoz/sftp. Upload files to ./services/sftp/upload/. Default credentials: foo/pass on port 3022.
notes: Codespaces only forward HTTP ports. To expose SFTP externally, run an ngrok TCP tunnel manually: ./ngrok tcp 3022. See README for full ngrok setup instructions. Connect locally with: sftp -P 3022 foo@localhost
